title: 32x Smooth Shaded Font
description:
a high detail smooth font! - based off the original "Smooth font - 32x" By apt9002 - 

edit by Sparky
body:
## Minecraft is a 3D game, so why is the font so _Flat?_ 
![Whats the point of the font?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/349adbd03d71a34a2e7cd686eca7050e3511a00c.png)
This font is a modified version of "Smooth font - 32x" By apt9002, with inspriation from the "Shaded font" By Philliamm.
 - This font should work on all versions of the game
- this font only changes the basic english and arabic numbers. more niche characters are only smooth, not shaded.
- this font works with colors too!
![Font with colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/550db9727098e43d300304fc43ad1a82186403d7_0.webp)
If you like the font, Use it! Download it, apply it above your other texture packs, and enjoy!

- ![Ascii sheet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a87bb6bc37863f8feeecf54a828428a1a3d57fa0.png)
